mapper.sql: a.id, a.parent_id AS "parentId", a.name, a.name_en AS "name_EN", a.permission AS "perms", '1' AS "permsType", a.icon, a.front_end_assembly AS "component", a.access_path AS "url", a.href AS "redirect", a.sort AS "sortNo", a.menu_type AS "menuType", a.route_menu AS "route", a.whether_to_cache AS "keepAlive", a.remarks AS "description", a.create_by AS "createBy", a.del_flag = "delFlag", 0 AS "ruleFlag", a.whether_to_hide AS "hidden", a.hide_tab AS "hideTab", a.create_date AS "createTime", a.update_by AS "updateBy", a.update_date AS "updateTime", '1' AS "status", a.opening_mode AS "internalOrExternal"
mapper.select:
SELECT
,(select case when exists(select 1 from sys_menu where parent_id = a.id) then 0 else 1 end from sys_dual) AS "leaf" FROM sys_menu a JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = a.id JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = rm.role_id AND r.useable='1' JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = ur.user_id AND u.id = #{userId} WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND r.del_flag = '0' AND u.del_flag = '0' AND a.id != '1' ORDER BY a.sort

SELECT
,(select case when exists(select 1 from sys_menu where parent_id = a.id) then 0 else 1 end from sys_dual) AS "leaf" FROM sys_menu a WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.id != '1' ORDER BY a.sort
mapper.sql: a.id AS "pageID", a.parent_id AS "parentID", a.parent_ids AS "parentIDS", a.name AS "pageName", a.href AS "pageUrl", a.icon AS "pageIcon", a.sort AS "orderNo", a.sign AS "sign", a.type_ AS "type", a.name_en AS "pageName_EN", a.href AS "actionUrl", a.is_show AS "isShow", a.app_menu AS "appMenu", a.permission, a.remarks, a.target

a.id AS "pageID", a.parent_id AS "parentID", a.parent_ids AS "parentIDS", a.name AS "pageName", a.href AS "pageUrl", a.icon AS "pageIcon", a.sort AS "orderNo", a.sign AS "sign", a.type_ AS "type", a.name_en AS "pageName_EN", a.href AS "actionUrl", a.remarks AS "remarks", a.permission AS "permission", a.create_by AS "createdBy", a.create_date AS "createdOn", a.update_by AS "modifiedBy", a.update_date AS "modifiedOn", a.is_show AS "isShow", a.app_menu AS "appMenu", p.name AS "parent.name"

a.id, a.parent_id AS "parent.id", a.parent_ids AS "parentIds", a.name, a.href, a.target, a.icon, a.sort, a.is_show AS "isShow", a.app_menu AS "appMenu", a.permission, a.remarks, a.create_by AS "createBy.id", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_by AS "updateBy.id", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", p.name AS "parent.name", a.subsystem_codelist AS "subSystemCodeList", a.sign AS "sign", a.type_ AS "type"
LEFT JOIN sys_menu p ON p.id = a.parent_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_menu a WHERE a.id != '1' /*AND a.is_show = '1'*/
AND a.id in ( select menu_id from sys_subsystem_menu a inner join sys_subsystem b on a.subsystem_id = b.id where b.code = #{subSystemCode} )
ORDER BY a.sort
SELECT DISTINCT a.permission FROM sys_menu a WHERE a.del_flag = #{DEL_FLAG_NORMAL} AND a.permission IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu( id, parent_id, parent_ids, name, name_en, href, target, icon, sort, is_show, permission, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, remarks, del_flag, subsystem_codelist, sign, type_ ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{parent.id}, #{parentIds}, #{name}, #{nameEn}, #{href}, #{target}, #{icon}, #{sort}, #{isShow}, #{appMenu}, #{permission}, #{createBy.id}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy.id}, #{updateDate}, #{remarks}, #{delFlag}, #{subSystemCodeList}, #{sign}, #{type} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET parent_id = #{parent.id}, parent_ids = #{parentIds}, name = #{name}, name_en = #{nameEn}, href = #{href}, target = #{target}, icon = #{icon}, sort = #{sort}, is_show = #{isShow}, app_menu = #{appMenu}, permission = #{permission}, update_by = #{updateBy.id}, update_date = #{updateDate}, remarks = #{remarks}, subsystem_codelist = #{subSystemCodeList}, sign = #{sign}, type_ = #{type_} WHERE id = #{id}
DELETE FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id} OR parent_ids LIKE #{idLike}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_menu a
WHERE a.id != '79' order by a.sort

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_role_menu a INNER JOIN sys_menu b ON b.id = a.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_role c ON c.id = a.role_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role d ON d.role_id = c.id INNER JOIN sys_user e ON e.id = d.user_id WHERE e.id = #{userId} AND b.permission = #{permission}
SELECT DISTINCT name_, key_ FROM act_re_procdef WHERE category_ = #{category}
